type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The 2011 Report was completed by a previous consultant and calculations were not available.  An adjustment factor for precipitation effect on road dust (rain/snow) as well as for 'wet' days (applied per CFIA requirement) was applied this year to road dust calculations which resulted in reduced emission of particulate matter.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The 2011 report was completed by another consultant and calculations were not available. An adjustment factor for precipitation (rain/snow) days and for 'wet' days (applied per CFIA requirements) was applied for this year to the road dust calculation, resulting in lower emissions of particulate matter.
